steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states some expressions appear only in songs, while current preservation efforts focus on spoken language. The question asks what logically follows — the answer must bridge that gap.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'unrelated analysis': Proposes analyzing songs for something other than preservation. Does not solve the preservation gap. ✗
  • Choice B — 'describe songs without solving preservation': Acknowledges songs exist but takes no action toward preserving their unique expressions. ✗
  • Choice C — 'incorporating songs into preservation efforts': Directly closes the gap — if songs contain expressions not found in speech, adding songs to preservation efforts captures all expressions. ✓
  • Choice D — 'unsupported claim': Makes a claim the passage does not support. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
